content.speakerText: Alright, we covered everything—thanks for your help!
content.speakerTextCn: 好，我们聊完了，谢谢你帮忙！
expectedAnswers: No problem! Let’s catch up next week over coffee.
You’re welcome! I’ll send the summary by end of day.
Thanks for your time! I’ll follow up with an email tomorrow.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否明确表达了结束通话并约定下次联系
语言准确性：语法正确，用词恰当，无中式英语
表达自然度：语气友好，符合英语口语习惯
关键词覆盖：使用了 catch up / send notes / EOD / follow up 等场景关键词

content.speakerText: I’m gonna sign off now—my cat’s knocking over my coffee!
content.speakerTextCn: 我要下线了，我家猫把我的咖啡撞翻了！
expectedAnswers: Haha, poor cat! See you tomorrow!
Oh no! Hope your coffee’s okay—talk later!
Cat emergencies! 😅 Catch you on Monday!
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否幽默回应生活细节并自然道别
语言准确性：语法正确，使用了恰当的口语表达
表达自然度：语气轻松、有情感共鸣，符合非正式语境
关键词覆盖：使用了 Haha / no worries / see you / catch you 等结束语关键词

content.speakerText: I really appreciate your help today!
content.speakerTextCn: 今天非常感谢你的帮助！
expectedAnswers: My pleasure! Let’s keep in touch—maybe next week?
Glad I could help! I’ll send you the files by Friday.
Thank you too! Looking forward to our next conversation.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否表达了感谢并主动推进后续联系
语言准确性：语法和用词符合英语母语习惯
表达自然度：语气真诚、不生硬，有情感温度
关键词覆盖：使用了 appreciate / keep in touch / send files / next conversation 等场景关键词
